        newDimscordBackend
      • newDimscordBackend(discord: DiscordClient): RestBackend
        newInteractionHandler
      • newInteractionHandler(discord: DiscordClient; defaultGuildId = ""): InteractionHandler

The dimscord-backed RestBackend and the handler constructor.

Command GET/PUT go through raw api.request with dimslash-built JSON: dimscord 1.8.0's own command serializer drops min_value/max_value/ min_length/max_length/channel_types, and its autocomplete choice type cannot carry float values.

Imports

types, context

Procs

proc newDimscordBackend(discord: DiscordClient): RestBackend {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newInteractionHandler(discord: DiscordClient; defaultGuildId = ""): InteractionHandler {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a handler wired to discord. Commands without an explicit guild = register to defaultGuildId when set, otherwise globally.
